research_batch.methodology: Compiled from publicly documented supplement stacks via podcasts, YouTube videos, blogs, and published protocols. Firecrawl API unavailable during this batch; confidence ratings reflect level of source verification available.
research_batch.notes: All entries reference publicly available content. High confidence = product name, brand, and dosage clearly stated in referenced video/article. Medium confidence = product/brand identified but exact dosage requires verification. Some timestamps estimated.

influencers.bio: Neuroscientist and tenured professor at Stanford School of Medicine. Host of the Huberman Lab podcast.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I take Athletic Greens in the morning, which is a foundational nutritional supplement...
supplement_stack.affiliate_details: Long-time AG1 sponsor; affiliate link in description

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I take 5000 IU of vitamin D3 each morning...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: How to Optimize Your Omega-3 Intake
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I aim for at least 1 gram of EPA per day from fish oil...
I take magnesium threonate 30-60 minutes before sleep...
Alpha-GPC for focus and cognitive work...
L-tyrosine for dopamine support...
Apigenin for sleep, derived from chamomile...
I take 5 grams of creatine monohydrate daily for cognitive and physical performance...

influencers.notes: Huberman's supplement stack is extensively documented across multiple podcast episodes and his newsletter. He has acknowledged sponsorships from Momentous and Athletic Greens. Stack has evolved over time; this represents most consistently mentioned supplements.

influencers.bio: Tech entrepreneur and founder of Blueprint, an extreme longevity protocol. Publicly shares all biomarkers, diet, and supplement data.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: The longevity mix contains creatine, collagen peptides, taurine, glycine, and more...
Essential capsules with vitamins D, E, K2, B-complex, zinc, and more...
NMN for NAD+ support and healthy aging...
NAC for glutathione support and antioxidant defense...
CoQ10 for mitochondrial health...
Ashwagandha for cortisol management...
Low-dose melatonin 300 micrograms for sleep...

influencers.notes: Bryan Johnson's entire Blueprint protocol is public at blueprint.bryanjohnson.com. All supplements are now sold under his own Blueprint brand. His stack is the most extensively documented of any influencer, with regular blood work published.

influencers.bio: Physician specializing in longevity, host of The Drive podcast. Focuses on evidence-based approaches to extending lifespan and healthspan.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I start my day with AG1...
supplement_stack.affiliate_details: AG1 is a podcast sponsor; uses affiliate link

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I take approximately 2 grams of EPA and 1 gram of DHA...
Vitamin D3, 5000 IU daily...
Magnesium glycinate in the evening...
Methylfolate for MTHFR support...
Whey protein after workouts...

influencers.notes: Peter Attia has been transparent about his supplement stack on his podcast and in various interviews. He emphasizes that supplements are individualized and based on biomarker testing.

influencers.bio: PhD in biomedical science. Expert on nutritional health, brain aging, and genetics. Host of the FoundMyFitness podcast.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: My morning smoothie contains a blend of micronutrients...
Vitamin D3 with K2 in liquid form for better absorption...
I take 2-3 grams of combined EPA and DHA...
Magnesium glycinate before bed...
Sulforaphane for Nrf2 activation and detoxification...

influencers.notes: Rhonda Patrick is highly evidence-based and often cites specific studies. Her stack is focused on micronutrient optimization. She frequently discusses her smoothie recipe on podcasts.

influencers.bio: Founder of Bulletproof, author, and biohacker. Known for Bulletproof Coffee and extensive supplement protocols.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I put collagen in my Bulletproof Coffee...
Brain Octane for ketone production and mental clarity...
Vitamin D3 for immune and hormone support...
Glutathione is the master antioxidant...
PQQ for mitochondrial biogenesis...

influencers.notes: Dave Asprey's supplement stack is tied to his Bulletproof brand. He has been open about his extensive protocol in books and on his podcast.

influencers.bio: Medical doctor focused on evidence-based supplement reviews and longevity research. Known for rigorous analysis of clinical trials.

supplement_stack.source_video_title: My 2025 Supplement Stack (What I Actually Take)
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Creatine monohydrate, 5 grams every day...

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Omega-3 fish oil for cardiovascular and brain health...

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Vitamin D3 2000 IU...

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Nicotinamide riboside for NAD+ levels...

influencers.notes: Dr. Stanfield is one of the most rigorous evidence-based supplement reviewers. His stack is relatively conservative and aligned with published research.

influencers.bio: Author of The 4-Hour Body, angel investor, and host of The Tim Ferriss Show. Pioneer in self-experimentation and biohacking.

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Tim Ferriss on Morning Routine & Supplements
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: AG1 has been part of my morning routine for years...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Tim Ferriss on Morning Routine & Supplements
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Magnesium before bed for sleep quality...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Tim Ferriss on Morning Routine & Supplements
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Vitamin D is one of the few supplements I consistently take...

influencers.notes: Tim Ferriss is known for self-experimentation. His supplement recommendations have evolved over time. He's an investor in Athletic Greens.

influencers.bio: Professor of Genetics at Harvard Medical School. Pioneer in aging research, focusing on sirtuins, NAD+, and resveratrol.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I take 1 gram of NMN each morning...
Resveratrol to activate sirtuins...
Metformin for longevity pathways...
Vitamin D3 with K2...
CoQ10 for mitochondrial health...

influencers.notes: Sinclair's stack is controversial in some circles but has significantly influenced the longevity supplement market. Metformin is prescription-only in most countries.

influencers.bio: Former bodybuilder, Ironman triathlete, and biohacker. Author and host of the Ben Greenfield Life podcast.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Kion protein products for recovery...
Kion Aminos for muscle protein synthesis...
Kion Flex with turmeric, glucosamine, and more...
High dose omega-3 for inflammation control...
Creatine for cognitive and physical performance...

influencers.notes: Ben Greenfield owns Kion, so most of his stack is his own brand. He has been transparent about this. His stack is extensive and frequently updated.

influencers.bio: Author and biohacker focused on longevity, metabolic health, and nutrition optimization. Author of Metabolic Autophagy.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Creatine monohydrate is one of the most researched supplements...
High-quality fish oil for omega-3 index...
Vitamin D3 is essential for hormone function...
Magnesium glycinate before bed...
NMN for NAD+ and sirtuin activation...

influencers.notes: Siim Land has affiliate relationships with some supplement brands (notably DoNotAge). His stack has evolved significantly over time.

influencers.bio: Fitness and nutrition expert focused on keto, intermittent fasting, and metabolic health. One of the most popular fitness nutrition channels.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Magnesium glycinate for sleep and recovery...
Fish oil for inflammation modulation...
Creatine post-workout for recovery...
Electrolytes for hydration on a low-carb diet...

influencers.notes: DeLauer's supplement stack is relatively moderate compared to his supplement review content. He has partnerships with various brands that change periodically.

influencers.bio: Deep-dive supplement science analyst. Known for rigorous ingredient analysis and calling out supplement industry practices. Founder of Gorilla Mind.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Gorilla Mode for pre-workout...
Gorilla Mind Smooth for cognitive enhancement...
Creatine daily, non-negotiable...
High-DHA fish oil for brain health...
Vitamin D3 for hormone optimization...

influencers.notes: Derek owns Gorilla Mind, so his entire stack is his own brand. He's very transparent about ingredients and dosages in his formulas. His content is highly analytical.

influencers.bio: Natural bodybuilder and evidence-based fitness educator. Known for comprehensive supplement tier lists and science-backed recommendations.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Creatine is the most evidence-backed supplement...
Whey protein for muscle protein synthesis...
Caffeine for performance enhancement...
Vitamin D for overall health...

influencers.notes: Jeff Nippard is evidence-based and relatively conservative with supplements. He's transparent that most supplements beyond protein, creatine, and caffeine have limited evidence.

influencers.bio: Physician, author, and leader in functional medicine. Founder of The UltraWellness Center and host of The Doctor's Farmacy podcast.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: A high-quality multivitamin is foundational...
Omega-3s are critical for brain and heart health...
Vitamin D3 for immune function...
Magnesium for over 300 enzymatic reactions...
Gut health is central to overall health...

influencers.notes: Dr. Hyman's supplement recommendations are based on functional medicine principles. He emphasizes testing before supplementing and individualizes protocols.

influencers.bio: Functional medicine physician focused on muscle-centric medicine. Author of Forever Strong.

supplement_stack.source_video_title: My Daily Supplement Routine for Muscle Health
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Creatine is essential for muscle and brain health...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: My Daily Supplement Routine for Muscle Health
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: High-quality protein is critical for muscle protein synthesis...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: My Daily Supplement Routine for Muscle Health
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Omega-3s for muscle and metabolic health...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: My Daily Supplement Routine for Muscle Health
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Vitamin D for muscle function and immunity...

influencers.notes: Dr. Lyon has a partnership with Momentous supplements. Her focus is primarily on dietary protein and resistance training; supplements are supplementary.

influencers.bio: Chiropractor and health educator focused on keto, intermittent fasting, and nutritional solutions. One of the largest health channels on YouTube.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Electrolytes are crucial on a keto diet...
High-dose vitamin D3 is essential...
Nutritional yeast for natural B vitamins...
Gallbladder formula for fat digestion...
Cod liver oil for vitamins A and D...

influencers.notes: Dr. Berg sells his own supplement line and recommends his own products almost exclusively. His dosages for vitamin D are higher than standard recommendations (10,000 IU). His advice is controversial among medical professionals.

influencers.bio: Computer scientist, AI researcher, and host of the Lex Fridman Podcast. Has discussed his health and supplement routines with guests.

supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: I start the day with Athletic Greens...
Coffee in the morning for focus...
L-theanine with coffee to smooth out the caffeine...

influencers.notes: Lex Fridman's supplement stack is minimal and not a major focus of his content. His AG1 sponsorship is well-known.

influencers.bio: Professor of Kinesiology at CSU Fullerton. Expert in exercise physiology, human performance, and sports supplements. Frequent Huberman Lab collaborator.

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Dr. Andy Galpin: Optimal Supplementation for Performance
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Creatine is the most well-supported supplement for performance...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Dr. Andy Galpin: Optimal Supplementation for Performance
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Protein intake is critical, supplements can help meet targets...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Dr. Andy Galpin: Optimal Supplementation for Performance
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Electrolytes for hydration and performance...

supplement_stack.source_video_title: Dr. Andy Galpin: Optimal Supplementation for Performance
supplement_stack.transcript_excerpt: Vitamin D for muscle function and immune health...

influencers.notes: Andy Galpin is research-focused and evidence-based. His supplement recommendations are conservative and aligned with the scientific literature. He collaborated extensively with Huberman on the fitness series.

flagged_entries.issue: All supplements are own-brand (Blueprint). Protocol is extreme and medically supervised. Not representative of typical supplementation practices. Includes prescription medications alongside supplements.
Recommends only his own brand. Vitamin D dosage (10,000 IU) exceeds standard recommendations. Chiropractor, not MD — medical advice should be verified. Some claims disputed by medical community.
Includes prescription drug Metformin in his stack, which is not a dietary supplement. NMN legality varies by jurisdiction. Resveratrol research is mixed/controversial.
Supplement routine is minimal and not a focus of his content. Limited transparency about exact brands and dosages. Low data quality for the intended directory.
All supplements listed are his own brand (Kion). Extensive stack — some supplements lack strong evidence. Commercial interest bias.
All supplements are from his own brand (Gorilla Mind). Stack includes high-stimulant pre-workouts. Strong commercial interest.
AG1 appears in stacks of Huberman, Attia, Ferriss, and Fridman — all have sponsorship/affiliate relationships. Cross-reference required.
